metadata.description: A curated marketplace of utility plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: wingman
plugins.description: A utility suite for developing new features with structured workflows

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: A complete software development workflow for coding agents, built on composable skills covering TDD, brainstorming, planning, subagent-driven development, debugging, and code review

plugins.name: speckit
plugins.description: Specification-driven development workflow for Claude Code. Provides skills for feature specification, planning, task generation, implementation, and analysis.

plugins.name: brainstorm
plugins.description: A collaborative brainstorming skill that turns ideas into clarity through structured dialogue.
